interactions.description: Both are NSAIDs. Taking them together significantly increases the risk of stomach bleeding and ulcers. Ibuprofen may also interfere with aspirin's cardioprotective effects.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination unless specifically directed by a healthcare provider. If using aspirin for heart protection, take it at least 30 minutes before ibuprofen.

interactions.description: Significantly increases the risk of bleeding. Aspirin inhibits platelet function while warfarin inhibits clotting factors.
interactions.recommendation: Use combination only under close medical supervision with regular INR monitoring.

interactions.description: Alcohol increases the risk of lactic acidosis with metformin. Can also cause low blood sugar.
interactions.recommendation: Limit or avoid alcohol while taking metformin. Never drink on an empty stomach.

interactions.description: Grapefruit juice can increase atorvastatin levels in the blood, increasing the risk of side effects including muscle problems.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid grapefruit and grapefruit juice while taking atorvastatin.

interactions.description: Amlodipine can increase simvastatin levels, raising the risk of muscle problems including rhabdomyolysis.
interactions.recommendation: Limit simvastatin dose to 20mg daily when taking with amlodipine.

interactions.description: Omeprazole can reduce the effectiveness of clopidogrel by inhibiting its activation in the liver.
interactions.recommendation: Consider using pantoprazole instead, or take medications 12 hours apart.

interactions.description: Losartan can increase potassium levels. Taking potassium supplements can lead to dangerously high potassium (hyperkalemia).
interactions.recommendation: Avoid potassium supplements unless specifically prescribed. Monitor potassium levels regularly.

interactions.description: Both can raise potassium levels. Combination significantly increases risk of life-threatening hyperkalemia.
interactions.recommendation: Use with extreme caution. Regular potassium monitoring is essential.

interactions.description: Calcium can reduce absorption of levothyroxine, making it less effective.
interactions.recommendation: Take levothyroxine at least 4 hours apart from calcium supplements.

interactions.description: Iron can reduce absorption of levothyroxine, making it less effective.
interactions.recommendation: Take levothyroxine at least 4 hours apart from iron supplements.

interactions.description: Azithromycin may increase the anticoagulant effect of warfarin, increasing bleeding risk.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor INR more frequently during and after azithromycin course.

interactions.description: Beta blockers can block the bronchodilating effect of salbutamol and may worsen asthma or COPD.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid non-selective beta blockers in patients with asthma. If beta blocker is needed, use cardioselective types.

interactions.description: Alcohol may increase the sedating effects of cetirizine.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid or limit alcohol. Do not drive or operate machinery if drowsiness occurs.

interactions.description: Amoxicillin may increase methotrexate levels by reducing its elimination from the body.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor for methotrexate toxicity. May need dose adjustment.

interactions.description: NSAIDs like ibuprofen can reduce the blood pressure-lowering effect of ACE inhibitors and may impair kidney function.
interactions.recommendation: Use with caution. Monitor blood pressure and kidney function.

interactions.description: PPIs significantly reduce absorption of atazanavir, an HIV medication, potentially leading to treatment failure.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid concurrent use. Consider alternative acid-reducing strategies.

interactions.description: Iodinated contrast dye used in imaging studies can cause kidney problems, which may increase the risk of metformin-induced lactic acidosis.
interactions.recommendation: Stop metformin before the procedure and restart 48 hours after, once kidney function is confirmed to be normal.

interactions.description: Regular alcohol use with paracetamol significantly increases the risk of liver damage.
interactions.recommendation: Limit alcohol intake. Do not exceed recommended paracetamol doses. Seek medical attention if combining chronically.

interactions.description: Regular use of paracetamol may increase the anticoagulant effect of warfarin.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor INR more frequently if using paracetamol regularly.

interactions.description: Aspirin can increase methotrexate levels by reducing its elimination, leading to increased toxicity.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination with high-dose methotrexate. Monitor closely with low-dose methotrexate.
